programs.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
programs.desc: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

programs.title: 2026 Silver Eagle is here & it is a once-in-a-lifetime coin!
programs.desc: Join your hosts Kevin Cash & Cory Cady as we discuss the 250th Anniversary of America with the official "America 250" logo on a Silver American Eagle label; we are locking in orders for this iconic release, but coins are limited! Don't miss out!

programs.title: Interested in Gold? Learn More!
programs.desc: Gold has been the best long-term asset class for thousands of years; find out how you can protect your financial future by diversifying your nest-egg with physical gold today.

programs.title: Amazing Facts With Doug Batchelor
programs.desc: Pastor Doug Batchelor reveals facts about biblical events and brings new insight to frequently asked questions in Christianity.

programs.title: David Jeremiah
programs.desc: In this weekly program, Dr. David Jeremiah delivers practical messages to the congregation at the Shadow Mountain Community Church in San Diego. Also featured is music from the Shadow Mountain Community Church Choir and Orchestra, as well as performances by musical guests that have included Steve Green and Charles Billingsley. Men and women who have been impacted by the Turning Point ministry also share their stories with viewers. During the month of December, "Turning Point" usually features special Christmas programming.

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: A former firefighter gives the guys unprecedented access to his jam-packed barns and sheds; a glittering collection of oddities and memorabilia; the first glimpse of the new store addition.
